LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT 2211 BRODERICK STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motoin To Bifurcate
Off Calendar Dec-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT 2211 BRODERICK STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice. There is no showing at this stage why bifurcation is warranted. The issue of bifurcation will be left to the discretion of the trial judge. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
